title: Implement node popover and canvas branch navigation
action: Build node popover and canvas branch navigation covering grill Q2.1 (evidence in popover), Q2.2 (continuation routes as canvas branches), Q2.3 (validation checklist in popover), Q3.1 (popover via onContextMenu right-click/long-press), and Q4.2 (swimlane branch layout). Concretely: node onContextMenu (right-click or long-press) calls preventDefault and opens popover rendering the recommendation evidence cluster (Recommended Command card, Purpose/Input/Output/Next Action as dl, Alternatives list, Source Status citations) plus Validation Checklist with checkedItems retained per step. Main canvas常驻 contains only node frames + navigation branches, MUST NOT persist evidence text. Migrate Next Choices to clickable canvas branch options emitted from the active node (reuse choice.targetStepId to advance setActiveStepId + setSelectedNodeId). Render Continuation Routes (stop/quality/knowledge) as terminal node canvas branch options (reuse terminalRoutes data), unified with Next Choices mechanism; MUST NOT be a standalone panel or popover-internal buttons. Branch layout: main path extends rightward along horizontal axis with y aligned; alternative/parallel branches (from alternatives field) offset up/down (swimlane feel); selected highlights main line, unselected secondary styled lower-saturation/thinner-stroke; compute coordinates via geometry rules using constants MAIN_LINE_GAP (horizontal spacing on main line) and BRANCH_OFFSET (vertical offset for branches, alternating up/down); no graphics library.
implementation: In src/main.tsx: implement onContextMenu handler on node elements calling e.preventDefault() and setting popover state {nodeId, x, y}; support long-press (touchstart + timeout) for touch devices; render popover absolutely positioned at event coordinates.

Popover content: Recommended Command card (command name + rank/confidence), Purpose/Input/Output/Next Action as <dl>, Alternatives list, Source Status with sourceRefs (from TASK-001 RecommendationGroup), and Validation Checklist with checkedItems retained per step (Record<stepId, string[]>).

Migrate Next Choices: remove className="choice-button" panel rendering; for the active node, render outgoing edges as clickable canvas branch elements; onClick advances choice.targetStepId via setActiveStepId and setSelectedNodeId.

Continuation Routes: for terminal nodes, render stop/quality/knowledge as canvas branch options reusing terminalRoutes data; same click mechanism as Next Choices; MUST NOT render as separate panel or popover buttons.

Layout constants: MAIN_LINE_GAP (e.g. 220) horizontal spacing for main path nodes with shared y; BRANCH_OFFSET (e.g. 90) vertical offset for alternative/parallel branches, alternating +offset/-offset for successive branches; compute node x = stepIndex * MAIN_LINE_GAP, node y = mainLineY + branchSign * BRANCH_OFFSET; pure arithmetic, no graphics library.
Styling: selected/main-line nodes full saturation + standard stroke; unselected/secondary nodes lower saturation + thinner stroke (e.g. opacity 0.55, stroke-width 1).
Ensure main canvas常驻 renders only node frames + branch edges; evidence text appears exclusively inside popover.

Update src/main.test.tsx with [UI-observable] assertions and scripts/e2e-smoke.mjs to verify: right-click opens popover with evidence cluster, clicking a canvas branch advances step, terminal routes render as branches, checkedItems persist per step.

criteria: src/main.tsx contains 'preventDefault' in context menu handler
src/main.tsx contains 'MAIN_LINE_GAP' or 'BRANCH_OFFSET' branch layout constants
src/main.tsx does not contain 'className="choice-button"' as panel button (migrated to canvas branch)
src/main.tsx contains terminalRoutes rendered as canvas branch options
[UI-observable] npm run test:e2e exits 0 and verifies right-click popover shows evidence, canvas branch navigation advances step, terminal routes render as branches
